items: Loads with no console errors
Reaches gameplay in ≤1 input from load
Core loop reachable and completes one full cycle
Restart/retry works
Audio plays, mute works
No crash, no stuck states, no infinite loading
Played with zero prior context / instructions
No "wait, what do I do?" moments (or noted below if any)
Every action attempted was handled gracefully
Always clear: what to do now / what I just did / what's next
Every menu screen: every control does what its label says
Every input method reaches every action (keyboard/touch/controller)
Every currency/progression system: earn it, spend it, see it update
Every save/load path: close and reopen, state survives correctly
Edge states checked: 0 of something, max of something, first vs Nth time
Checked at min and max supported resolution/aspect ratio
Played 3–5 full sessions back to back
No unfair difficulty spikes found (or noted below)
No boring/repetitive stretch found (or noted below)
Would play a 4th/5th run — yes/no + why (note below)
Rated 1-5: fun / fair / clear / would-recommend (note below)
Re-ran the platform's own requirements checklist top to bottom
Tested on actual target device classes, not just desktop
Tested failure paths: adblock on, slow network, background tab, orientation change
Re-tested everything touching the same system as the latest fix
Re-ran the smoke test (Pass 1) in full
Re-tested every caller of any shared/adapter code that changed
